## CURRENT LISTINGS — QUALIFYING PARCELS (Minimum 2 acres, Under $60,000)

**$59,000 | 2.49 acres | Arroyo Hondo | Water: electricity at lot | Road: county road (Los Rios) | Source: Zillow | URL: Mesa Sea Rd, Arroyo Hondo, NM 87513**

Additional verification: 
This 2.49-acre property at Mesa Sea Rd in Arroyo Hondo, NM 87513 is available for sale at $39,000 with a price per acre of $15,663, listed by Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices Taos Real Estate
.

## MARKET CONTEXT

Average price per acre in Taos County, NM is $23,529 based on the listing price of 7,873 acres of land for sale
.

LandWatch has 516 land listings for sale in Taos County, NM
, with significant inventory across multiple platforms.

## SUBDIVISION AVAILABILITY — TARGET AREAS

Tres Piedras Estates is an undeveloped subdivision just outside of the small rural community of Tres Piedras in Taos County, with every property having platted street access, none are landlocked
.

The Carson Estates is an undeveloped subdivision and is one of the closest rural subdivisions to Taos, where people share common ideas of off-grid living
.

Hondo Mesa: 
Parcels located within Hondo Mesa just north of the 3-Mile Line, with property conveying with no restrictions, perfect for those looking at off-grid options but in an area closer to town
.

sections.builders:
## ZOOK CABINS (IRC Modular, Assembled Delivery)

**Pricing & Price Changes**
- 
Prices starting around $132,500 for their Rockwood model

- 
All park models at Zook Cabins include the cost of delivery, with prices that account for transport costs in the overall figure

- No confirmed 2025-2026 price increases available; January 2026 sources reference unchanged base pricing models

**Heritage/Grove ADU/Rivara ADU Models**
- Specific pricing not published on current website or search results; pricing requires direct quote request

**Customer Reviews**
- **Positive:** 
Zook Cabins has a 4.8 star rating with 592 reviews
. 
Customer reviews were overwhelmingly positive, detailing aspects like high-quality craftsmanship, stress-free project management, and skilled staff
. 
The entire purchase experience was easy and transparent, with every department including the delivery driver focused on quality and customer satisfaction

- **Negative:** 
One resort owner reported ordering two cabins 9 months prior with promised delivery by Memorial Day; instead cabins were delayed and the company refused phone calls, with set schedules blown twice

**Delivery to New Mexico**
- 
Build Buy Refi Home Loans and Zook Cabins serve the 48 continental states
; New Mexico delivery is available
- High-altitude 7,000 ft elevation not specifically addressed in documentation

**Model Changes**
- 
Franklin introduced as newest modern cabin model
 (2026)
- Grove and Rivara ADU models actively marketed but no discontinuations noted

## MIGHTY SMALL HOMES (SIP Panel Kits)

**Pricing & Price Changes**
- 
Cost estimate $140-$328+ per square foot, with the estimate all-inclusive (kit cost, labor, and site work)

- 
Kits can be completed and shipped in 6 weeks, or as little as 4 weeks with no customizations

- 
Shipping $4 per mile minimum $1,200 from Louisville, Kentucky

**Model Updates**
- 
14 kits available with styles including modern, contemporary, ranch, cottage, carriage homes

- No specific 2025-2026 model changes, additions, or discontinuations confirmed

**Customer Reviews**
- 
92% recommend (10 Reviews)
 on Facebook
- Limited publicly available detailed reviews; 
Mighty Small Homes based in Louisville is on a mission to build homes two to three times more energy-efficient than traditional homes

- No significant negative reviews located in current search results

**Delivery to New Mexico**
- 
Kits shipped across U.S. and beyond

- No stated restrictions on high-altitude regions; SIP panels suitable for elevation but require local contractor assembly

**Critical Gap**
- 
Only ships structural shell components; buyers responsible for finishing interior including electrical, plumbing, finishes, flooring, cabinetry, and appliances

sections.offgrid:
**NM Solar Incentives / Legislation 2025–2026**

• 
A 2026 bill in the New Mexico Legislature proposes increasing the state solar tax credit from 10% to 30% with the cap increasing from $6,000 to $15,000.
 https://350newmexico.org/solar-and-battery-storage/

• 
President Trump signed legislation on July 4, 2025, which completely cancels the home solar tax credit beginning on January 1, 2026, 10 years before it was supposed to expire.
 https://solarsme.com/solarsme-new-mexico/

**Alternative Housing: Taos Earthship & Pangea Community**

• 
Pangea Biotecture announced an agreement with the Tarleton Family to acquire the Tarleton Ranch property, a 300+ acre site that will be transformed into a sustainable and regenerative living development designed to honor the spirit of Taos—of, for, and by the people of Taos—reflecting a deep commitment to affordable housing, cultural preservation, and ecological stewardship.
 https://pangeabuild.com/pangea-community-a-visionary-off-grid-development-in-taos-new-mexico/

**Note:** Taos County zoning, NM CID modular home updates, specific Taos off-grid community events, and recent NM water rights/well drilling updates yielded no substantive current news items within the search results for the 2025–2026 period. General frameworks exist (regulations, licensing, zoning structures) but no dated announcements of recent policy changes or event schedules.

20% discount on SIPs and support beams through April 30, 2026

**Pacific Yurts**
• 20ft Yurt: 
$7,130
 (base kit, platform/floor not included)
• 24ft Yurt: 
$8,180
 (base kit, platform/floor not included)
• Lead Times: Not specified; available to order
• Insulation Package: Available as custom option; 
Seven-layer NASA-developed reflective insulation option available

• Contact: yurts.com | 541-942-9435 | 1-800-944-0240
• Note: Pricing from 2013 price list; current 2026 pricing not found

**General 20-24ft Insulated Yurt Pricing Context**
• 
24-foot diameter kit yurts cost $11,500–$35,000 depending on features

• 
Insulation upgrades add $5,000–$15,000 depending on features and size

• 
Platform construction: $5,000–$8,000 (standard base); $14,000–$20,000+ (structural insulated panels/SIPS for cold climates)
